message:
feat(ingest,runtime): bound capture segments to persistence limit before pattern detection

Add bounded_segment_for_persistence() that applies the default 64KB persistence
size limit to a CapturedSegment, matching what persist_captured_segment() would
enforce internally. The runtime now calls this *before* running pattern detection,
ensuring that regex engines operate on the same bounded content that will actually
be stored. Previously, an oversized segment could trigger detections on content
that would be truncated away before persistence, causing phantom alerts with no
corresponding stored evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
